top_signals.title: CATL Debuts Battery Storage System Using New Sodium Technology
top_signals.summary: Contemporary Amperex Technology Co. Ltd. has launched a new sodium battery storage system, and expects to start delivering it to China in September.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AryStinger botnet infected thousands of D-Link routers worldwide
top_signals.summary: A previously undocumented malware botnet named AryStinger has compromised more than 4,000 outdated routers to turn them into proxies for malicious traffic. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK PM Starmer resigns as Britain faces its seventh leader in 10 years
top_signals.summary: Keir Starmer said he will resign as U.K. prime minister and Labour leader, triggering a contest to choose his successor.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Korean Stocks Fall More Than 4% From Record High on Tech Selloff
top_signals.summary: South Korean stocks tumbled as investors sold off chip heavyweights on renewed concerns that the rally has become overstretched.

top_signals.title: AbbVie buys Apogee for $10.9bn to acquire inflammatory disease drug
top_signals.summary: Drugmaker’s largest deal in more than half a decade comes amid surge of M&A in sector

top_signals.title: Foodpanda bike deliveries take off in Myanmar as fuel prices surge
